posts.content:
https://samudrafm.com/request
Send us your favourite jams!
Love music? Well this is your chance! Join our team at samudrafm.com/apply
In the car, at the gym, or relaxing at home? samudrafm.com is now just a click away! 🌍 📱

posts.title: samudrafm Temporary Hiatus
posts.content: 📢 Thank you for understanding! As our school SMK Taman SEA has started the final-term examination for Form 5 pupils, samudrafm will be temporarily put on hold during the examination period. Good luck to all students! 🍀

posts.title: samudrafm's New Season
posts.content: 🎵 Fresh beats and great vibes! Get ready for samudrafm's new season with exciting content coming your way!

posts.title: Meet Our President - Srishti
posts.content: 🎤 Introducing our President, SRISHTI GANESH! Leading samudrafm with passion and vision. "Every second of your life is an opportunity to learn something new." 🌟

posts.title: samudrafm '25
posts.content: 🔊 GOO 25' - samudrafm is here to bring you the freshest vibes this year! Stay tuned for more exciting content! 📻

posts.title: Meet Our Vice President - Vyshavi
posts.content: 🌟 Introducing our Vice President, VYSHAVI! Driving samudrafm forward with dedication and energy!

posts.title: Meet Our Secretary - Noelle
posts.content: 📋 Introducing our Secretary, NOELLE CHOY! Keeping samudrafm organized and running smoothly!

posts.title: Meet Our Arts & Designs - Qing Qing
posts.content: 🎨 Introducing our Arts & Designs, QING QING! Bringing creativity and visual magic to samudrafm!

posts.title: Meet Our Asst. Arts & Designs - Ryan
posts.content: 🎨 Introducing our Assistant Arts & Designs, RYAN! Supporting the creative vision of samudrafm!

posts.title: Meet Our AJK English - Airil
posts.content: 🎙️ Introducing our AJK bahasa Inggeris, AIRIL! Bringing English vibes to samudrafm!

posts.title: Meet Our AJK BM - Karisemma
posts.content: 🎙️ "No risk, no plot." Meet our AJK bahasa Melayu, KARISEMMA. Bringing Malay vibes to samudrafm!

posts.title: Meet Our AJK F5 - Michelle
posts.content: 🎙️ "You have to choose to love yourself, it's not natural, it's intentional. -Zooble" Meet our AJK F5, MICHELLE!

posts.title: Meet Our AJK F4 - Shayna
posts.content: 🎙️ "I'm so excited to graduate next year." Meet our AJK F4, SHAYNA!

posts.title: Meet Our AJK F3 - Sereena
posts.content: 🎙️ "I'm the chicken, I'm the egg, I'm the omelet." - Tyler The Creator/Hot Wind Blow. Meet samudrafm's AJK F3, SEREENA! 🎵

posts.title: samudrafm is Back!
posts.content: 🫶 Ever heard the sound of people talking or music playing at 7.05-7.20am every Tuesday and Wednesday? Don't fret! It's just us. samudrafm. We're back, ready to speak and ready to give you the latest news in school!

posts.title: Join samudrafm! - Recruitment 2025
posts.content: 📣 Calling all Form 3 and Form 4 students with a burning passion for speaking!! Join the samudrafm family now! Deadline: 13th April 2025

posts.title: Temporary Closure - SPM 2024
posts.content: 📢 Temporary closure of samudrafm in conjunction with SPM. Good luck to all SPM candidates!

posts.title: MPS2024 Booth Fun
posts.content: 🎉 Step right up for nonstop fun at our booth! 🎮 Play epic games, score awesome prizes, and grab exclusive badges! Come join the fun and make your day legendary! 😎🎯 #mps2024

posts.title: Song Request Feature
posts.content: 🎵 Yes! Now you can give us your song request or even dedicate a song to that special someone! Just scan the QR code and we will play your song request on the next show! #samudrafm

posts.title: Join the samudrafm Family! - Recruitment 2023
posts.content: 🎙️ Calling all Form 2, Form 3, and Form 4 students with a passion for radio and speaking! samudrafm is on the lookout for dynamic presenters to join our team. Application Deadline: 8th September 2023

posts.title: samudrafm is Back! - Post Mid-Exam
posts.content: 📻🎶 samudrafm is BACK! After a month-long pause due to mid-examinations, we're thrilled to announce our COMEBACK to the airwaves! Get ready to tune in again! 🎧🎤🎵

posts.title: Temporary Hiatus - Mid-Term Exams
posts.content: 📢 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE - samudrafm will be on a temporary hiatus during the mid-term examination period. We'll be back soon! Good luck on your exams! 📚

posts.title: 🎉 Celebrating 1 Month of Success!
posts.content: 🌊 From humble beginnings with just two passionate individuals, Jensen and Justin, samudrafm has grown into a vibrant crew of 15 dedicated volunteers! It all started with an incredible vision from Mr. Eugene. We've lit up our school, one song at a time! 🎧💙

posts.title: samudrafm Week 2 Update
posts.content: 🌊🎙️ samudrafm Week 2 Update! We're thrilled to share that our operations have been sailing smoothly with the addition of our incredible new crew members on the Bahasa Melayu department! 🙌🏽🎉

posts.title: First Week of Operations - Success!
posts.content: 🎉 Celebrating an Incredible First Week of Operations! We are thrilled to announce the successful launch and completion of the first week of operations for samudrafm! 📻✨

posts.title: Tasty Tuesday Show Summary
posts.content: 📻 The Tasty Tuesday Show Summary on samudrafm. Thank you for the wonderful morning today! We would love to have you give feedback to us. Every feedback is greatly appreciated!

posts.title: samudrafm Launch Announcement
posts.content: 📢 ANNOUNCEMENT: Tune In to samudrafm Live Broadcast Tomorrow Morning at SMK Taman SEA! 🎙️ Join us for an electrifying start to your day as samudrafm takes over the airwaves!
